name: Disconnect
short_description: What happened to the protagonist !?!? You're a skull, connect the dots in the platforming levels to expand upon the story and solve the mystery. All set in a black and white art style, inspired by classic 80/90s Punk posters.
detailed_description:
The dissonance that lies in wait. Going through the various stages of life, most of us face: unlock new story segments by completing a real time 3D puzzle platformer. 

 

In a 3D real-time puzzle platformer, use your fast reaction time and dash a skull from platform to platform and decipher the path to the next checkpoint. Regular platform shrinks on contact; one wrong move and it's back to where you started. Find power-ups across the level or collect coins to purchase more.

Use your power-ups to your advantage, and don't get off course. Not all platforms are equal, and you'll have to adjust for how each platform behaves. Use your foresight to overcome the dynamic levels, and reach the final destination.

On completion of each platform, you'll unlock a new story segment that gives perspective on the trials and tribulations of the human character we see. All embodied in a black-and-white art style inspired by Punk posters.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Greek, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese
